info.name: CrispCloud Delta Sync
info.summary: Block-level delta sync for CrispCloud file manager
info.description:
Companion server app for CrispCloud that enables block-level delta sync. Compatible with both Nextcloud and ownCloud 10.
Instead of re-uploading entire files when only a few blocks changed, this app maintains block-level indexes (Adler-32 + SHA-256 hashes per 4 MB block) and accepts partial block updates via a REST API.
Ideal for large files that change incrementally: VeraCrypt containers, database files, disk images, VM snapshots, PST archives.
## API Endpoints
- `GET /api/blockmap/{path}` — retrieve the block map for a file - `PUT /api/blocks/{path}?offset=N&size=M` — write a single block at offset - `POST /api/finalize/{path}` — finalize after block writes (update mtime/etag) - `GET /api/status` — check if the app is installed and working
## Compatibility
- Nextcloud 25–31 - ownCloud 10.11+ (uses shared OCP\Files and OCP\AppFramework APIs) - ownCloud Infinite Scale (oCIS): not supported (use Graph/delta API instead)
info.author: CrispCloud Contributors
